scripts.dev: npm run build -w @repopulse/shared && npm run build -w @repopulse/database && npm run build -w @repopulse/analysis-engine && tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.build: npm run build -w @repopulse/shared && npm run build -w @repopulse/database && npm run build -w @repopulse/analysis-engine && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @repopulse/shared && npm run build -w @repopulse/database && npm run build -w @repopulse/analysis-engine && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
